# Asset Run Template

Save completed notes as `docs/asset-runs/YYYY-MM-DD-short-slug.md`.

```md
# YYYY-MM-DD - <Asset Run>

## Scope

- Prompt sources:
- Runtime destinations:
- Consuming code:

## Generation

- Tool:
- Number of outputs:
- Generator cache:
- Prompt deviations or retries:

## Processing

- Source archive:
- Runtime operations:
- Commands:

## Verification

- Source hashes matched:
- Runtime dimensions and formats:
- Visual inspection:
- In-game result:

## Status

| Asset | Generated | Archived | Processed | Integrated | Verified | Playtested |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `<asset>` | yes/no | yes/no | yes/no | yes/no | yes/no | yes/no |

## Lessons

- Keep only information that should affect the next run.
```
